hooks.command: FILE=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.file_path // .path // ""'); case "$FILE" in *.rs) cd backend 2>/dev/null && cargo check --message-format=short 2>&1 | head -15 ;; *.ts|*.tsx) cd frontend 2>/dev/null && npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | head -15 ;; *) exit 0 ;; esac

INPUT=$(cat); if [ "$(echo $INPUT | jq -r '.stop_hook_active')" = 'true' ]; then exit 0; fi; FAIL=0; if [ -d backend/src ]; then cd backend && cargo test --quiet 2>&1 | tail -20; [ $? -ne 0 ] && FAIL=1; cargo clippy --quiet -- -D warnings 2>&1 | tail -10; [ $? -ne 0 ] && FAIL=1; cd ..; fi; if [ -d frontend/src ]; then cd frontend && npx vitest run --reporter=verbose 2>&1 | tail -20; [ $? -ne 0 ] && FAIL=1; npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false 2>&1 | tail -10; [ $? -ne 0 ] && FAIL=1; cd ..; fi; [ $FAIL -ne 0 ] && exit 2 || exit 0
COMMAND=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r '.command'); if echo "$COMMAND" | grep -qE 'rm\s+-rf|DROP\s+DATABASE|DROP\s+TABLE'; then echo 'BLOCKED: destructive command detected'; exit 2; fi; exit 0
